creator: freebsd@spatula.net
text:
Not sure what happened, but here is the corrected distinfo:

MD5 (sex-1.0.tar.gz) = c35a3cfe1536f1b2a16102526a74edd6


On Mon, 28 May 2001, Peter Pentchev wrote:

> Is the games/sex FreeBSD port maintainer aware of this problem report?
>
> G'luck,
> Peter
>
> --
> You have, of course, just begun reading the sentence that you have just finished reading.
>
> On Mon, May 28, 2001 at 11:27:33AM -0700, ats@first.gmd.de wrote:
> >
> > >Number:         27714
> > >Category:       ports
> > >Synopsis:       ports/games/sex has a checksum error
> > >Originator:     Andreas Schulz
> > >Release:        4.3-RELEASE
> > >Organization:
> > GMD-FIRST
> > >Environment:
> > FreeBSD freebsd.first.gmd.de 4.3-RELEASE FreeBSD 4.3-RELEASE #0: Thu May  3 20:2
> > 8:30 CEST 2001     root@freebsd.first.gmd.de:/usr/src/sys/compile/FREEBSD  i386
> > >Description:
> > ports/games/sex give a checksum error if you fetches the tarfile
> > from the mastersite. compiles ok. Maybe only a new checksum is
> > needed ?
> > >How-To-Repeat:
> > fetch it and try a make checksum
> > >Fix:
> > new checksum into distinfo and cvs ?
>

-- 
"And when I have understanding of computers, _I_ shall be the supreme being!"
	-- Evil, Time Bandits
